summary: Backend-only testing for Hodler Inn bug fixes. All billing calculation and sync agent version tests passed (19/19). The two critical fixes are verified working: (1) Nights billed calculation now uses ceil(hours/24) instead of calendar days - 28-hour stays correctly bill as 2 nights, (2) SYNC_AGENT_VERSION is correctly set to 2026-03-05-v4.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two bug fixes have been verified: (1) Billing calculation fix at server.py:563-590 uses math.ceil(hours/24) for nights billed - edge cases like 28 hours = 2 nights all pass; (2) Sync agent classification fix at sync_agent.py:1474-1600 ensures entries matched by name are counted as 'verified' even when already verified on portal or when verify_entry fails.

billing_calculation.description: Nights billed calculation now uses 24-hour periods (ceil(hours/24))

sync_agent_version.version_comment: Fixed classification bug: entries now counted as verified even when portal already verified or verify_entry fails

sync_agent_classification.description: The run_sync method at lines 1474-1600 now correctly handles three scenarios: (1) Already verified on portal AND matches Hodler record -> counted as verified; (2) verify_entry succeeds -> counted as verified; (3) verify_entry fails but name match confirmed -> still counted as verified with portal_update_failed flag
